body_txt:
People who can already control the elements may be able to create such weapons via Spontaneous Weapon Creation . An Ultimate Blacksmith might have the ability to craft such a weapon. Might be a type of Enhanced Archaic Weapon . Compare Elemental Armor . Elemental Punch and Spell Blade techniques can temporarily turn a normal weapon into one of these. See also The Magic Touch .
Subtrope to Magical Weapon .
